li.font:
✓ When event pipeline wins on Sharpe and Sortino:
retain LLM structured-event features.

✓ When sentiment baseline is stronger:
prefer lexicon path or improve news alignment.

✓ Always compare portfolio paths, drawdown,
cumulative return, and episode consistency.
